conditional_code_decision_rules.XXS99XX: daml_required is true in the verdict. MUST be first if present.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXHRCXX: Any counterparty involves a FATF grey/black-listed jurisdiction. FATF Black List (Feb 2026): DPRK, Iran, Myanmar. FATF Grey List (Feb 2026): Algeria, Angola, Bolivia, Bulgaria, Cameroon, Côte d'Ivoire, DRC, Haiti, Kenya, Kuwait, Lao PDR, Lebanon, Monaco, Namibia, Nepal, Papua New Guinea, South Sudan, Syria, Venezuela, Vietnam, Virgin Islands (UK), Yemen. Russia: FATF membership suspended Feb 2023.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXSNEXX: Any watchlist_hits entry has source HM_TREASURY, EU_CONSOLIDATED, or UN, OR a counterparty is confirmed sanctioned.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXD7XX: Customer or associated person is a foreign/international PEP or sanctions associate (non-UK public function).
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXD8XX: Customer or associated person holds or held a UK domestic public function.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXTBMLXX: Fund movements relate to trade transactions, import/export invoicing, or documentary letters of credit.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXPRFXX: A lawyer, accountant, or company formation agent is identified as facilitating the activity.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXPCPXX: Sanctioned entity is linked to weapons proliferation financing.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXD9XX: Bribery or corruption proceeds suspected alongside PEP proximity.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXTEOSX: PEP funds routed via offshore structures.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXPROPXX: Funds linked to real estate transactions.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXVAXX: Funds involve cryptocurrency or virtual assets.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXDRUXX: Activity consistent with drug trafficking proceeds.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXF9XX: Activity consistent with fraud proceeds against private sector.
conditional_code_decision_rules.XXGVTXX: Total activity value is £3,000 or less and no terrorism financing interest is known. Never combine with XXVICTXX.
